palette_hint: Background #F5F0E8 (warm off-white), body text #1C1C1C (near-black), accent #B5451B (burnt sienna) for links and headings, secondary accent #6B7B5E (muted sage) for dividers and metadata.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif at font-weight 700 for gravitas; body text in system-ui sans-serif at font-weight 400, 1.75 line-height for comfortable reading; all caps small labels in 0.75rem tracked letter-spacing.
description: Ink & Insomnia is the personal blog of Maren Voss, a night-owl writer and former librarian who publishes late-night journal entries, long-form essays on memory and place, and annotated reading lists.
constraints: All content columns capped at max-width 640px, centered with auto margins and 1.5rem horizontal padding on each side.
Page background is always #F5F0E8; no background color changes between sections — separation is achieved only with a 1px solid #6B7B5E horizontal rule and 2.5rem vertical spacing.
Links and post titles use color #B5451B with no underline by default; underline appears only on hover.
Post metadata (date, category) displayed as small all-caps text in #6B7B5E at 0.75rem, placed above each post title.
Buttons (e.g., 'Send Message', 'Read More') are plain rectangular elements: background #1C1C1C, text #F5F0E8, no border-radius, padding 0.6rem 1.4rem, font-size 0.9rem.

page_specs.journal: Displays the ten most recent journal entries as a vertical list, each showing the all-caps date and tag above a linked post title in #B5451B, followed by a two-sentence excerpt in body text and a 'Read More' button. Entries are separated by a 1px #6B7B5E rule with 2.5rem spacing. Topics include insomnia-fueled observations, neighborhood walks in Reykjavik, and half-finished crossword puzzles.
page_specs.essays: A curated archive of six long-form essays presented as titled cards in a single vertical stack — no images, just title, a one-line pull quote in italic, and a publication date. Essays cover subjects like 'The Smell of Libraries After Rain', 'Why I Quit Annotating Books', and 'On Living Alone in a City You Love'. Each essay title links to a static full-text page.
page_specs.reading-list: A plaintext-style page listing books Maren has read in the current year, organized under three bold heading labels: 'Finished', 'Abandoned', and 'Currently Reading'. Each entry shows author last name, title in #B5451B, and a one-sentence personal note in italic. The page opens with a two-sentence preamble explaining her annotation habits.
page_specs.about: A single centered block of five short paragraphs introducing Maren Voss — former municipal librarian in Akureyri, now freelance writer living in Reykjavik, writing mostly between midnight and 3am. Includes a plaintext list of three things she is always available to discuss: Scandinavian crime fiction, the Dewey Decimal System, and rye bread. Ends with a horizontal rule and a one-line sign-off in italic.
page_specs.contact: A minimal contact form with three labeled fields — Name, Email, and Message (textarea with 6 rows) — followed by a 'Send Message' button styled per the site's button spec. Above the form, a short two-sentence note explains that Maren reads every message but may reply slowly and only between midnight and dawn. No social media links; the page closes with a 1px rule and a small italic note reading 'No press inquiries, please.'
